subject: Carry over leave
description: How many unused annual leave days can I carry into next year?
resolution: Confirmed five days can carry and expire on March 31.

subject: Probation leave
description: Can I take annual leave during probation?
resolution: Manager approved accrued leave after the first 30 days.

subject: Half-day leave
description: Where do I request a half day?
resolution: Selected half-day duration in the HR portal request.

subject: Sick note
description: When is a medical certificate required?
resolution: Required from the third consecutive sick day.

subject: Emergency leave
description: My parent is in hospital. Which leave type should I use?
resolution: Approved three days of paid emergency leave.

subject: Cancel approved leave
description: Can I cancel leave that my manager already approved?
resolution: Cancelled in portal before payroll cutoff.

subject: Negative leave balance
description: Can I request annual leave before I accrue it?
resolution: Denied because negative annual leave requires HR approval.

subject: Public holiday overlap
description: A public holiday falls during my leave. Is it deducted?
resolution: Confirmed public holidays are not deducted from annual leave.
